identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a conversion-focused, minimalist, and ultra-premium B2B portal for Enhancements srl.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Editorial Fashion layouts with Swiss precision.
Emotion First: Evoke trust, exclusivity, and professionalism.
Content is King: The products and brands are the heroes. The UI is the frame.
Zoom In: Use macro textures to sell the 'feeling' of the cosmetics.
Negative Space: Massive padding to signal luxury.

headings.usage: Main headlines, section titles. Use italics for emphasis words.

usage_rules: Backgrounds must be predominantly White (#FFFFFF) or very soft light gray (#F9F9F9).
Text must be Soft Black (#0A0A0A) or Dark Grey (#333333). NEVER pure black on white.
Gold (#C5A059) is for 1px borders, active states, and fine details only. DO NOT use gold backgrounds.

grid_system.bento_features: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-px bg-border border border-border

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-accent transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary text-primary rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300
buttons.text_link: text-primary underline decoration-1 underline-offset-4 hover:decoration-accent transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px]

cards.feature: bg-white p-12 flex flex-col items-start gap-4 hover:bg-neutral-50 transition-colors duration-500
cards.brand: relative h-[60vh] md:h-[80vh] w-full overflow-hidden group

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-border px-0 py-4 focus:border-black focus:ring-0 rounded-none placeholder:text-neutral-400 transition-all text-lg font-light

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-black/5 h-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12

motion.reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }} viewport={{ once: true }}

hero.alt: Elegant model with golden makeup detail

homepage.content: Headline: 'Excellence in Cosmetic Distribution'. Sub: 'Enhancements srl brings the world's finest beauty brands to Italy.' CTA: 'Discover Portfolio'
Visual balance. Hover effects to reveal brand logos/descriptions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards. Use the custom 'feature' card style defined above.
Ensure the 'Trind' and 'Ingrid' logos are prominent in the Brand Showcase section.
The Contact Form must be clean, with no background on inputs (border-bottom only).
Footer must be massive (py-24) with a large typography logo.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
